papers_mined.title: Tuvan Throat Singing Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Khoomei: singer hums fundamental + selectively amplifies harmonic overtones (6th-13th partial); kargyraa undertone exactly half fundamental; vocal tract sustains stable overtone array.

papers_mined.title: Overtone Focusing Biphonic Tuvan eLife
papers_mined.note: Sygyt-style Khoomei merges multiple formants; vocal tract acts as filter selecting from underlying overtone array against fundamental anchor.

papers_mined.title: Throat-Singing Britannica
papers_mined.note: Mongolian khoomei produces fundamental + reinforced harmonic partial; pitch-deviation from harmonic-series ladder is judged as defective by master.

papers_mined.title: Tuvan Biphonic Overtone PMC
papers_mined.note: Vocal tract control to isolate single overtone above fundamental; deviations from clean overtone signal judged audibly.
